refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target over the agreed evaluation period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the evaluation period clarifies the requirement for design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Implement link redundancy or recovery mechanisms to maintain availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Implement real-time link health monitoring and alerting.
DP3: Employ adaptive bandwidth management to prioritize teleoperation traffic.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use redundant network links with automatic failover.

coupling_check.notes: Redundant network links logically isolate link availability concerns, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network infrastructure supports redundancy and failover.
Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 (monitoring) as a supporting DP in subsequent refinement levels.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsibility for teleoperation link availability including network management and failover logic.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections used for teleoperation data transmission and failover.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Status and health data of the teleoperation link sent to monitoring modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the NGHE Solution manages link redundancy and failover; low diffusion as logic is centralized.
Vehicle module has partial involvement but limited control over network redundancy.
Teleoperation module handles link usage but not redundancy management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management in the NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module may increase integration risk.
Dependency on external network infrastructure may limit control.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and consider modularizing failover logic if diffusion increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (redundant network links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR and supports the availability target.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing logic in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and network link monitoring is feasible within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Consider adding monitoring DP in next refinement to support failover.
Evaluate complexity impact on NGHE Solution module.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition is sound, adding monitoring and alerting as supporting FRs and DPs will improve robustness and verification clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Implement link redundancy or recovery mechanisms to maintain availability.

revise.why: To explicitly include monitoring and failure detection as sub-requirements supporting link availability.

assumptions: Network infrastructure supports redundancy and failover.
Telemetry interface can provide sufficient link health data.
open_risks: Complexity of failover logic may impact maintainability.
External network dependencies may limit achievable availability.
evidence_needed: Network performance and failover test results.
Telemetry data accuracy and latency measurements.
